what: Two REAL Stage-3 wire emissions, produced by Stage 3's own code, committed here so that Stage 4's handoff and content-reconstruction tests run in a clean checkout with no Stage-3 worktree present.
why_committed: The Stage-3 druglink package is not yet in this repository (03_druglink/analysis is empty on this branch). A handoff test that pointed at a developer's absolute path and skipped when it was missing gave the release gate zero integration coverage. These bytes make the required tests unskippable, and they are NOT generated by Stage-4 code: Stage 4 independently reconstructs their content hashes from the parquet rows, so generator and evaluator stay separate.
not_data: Entirely synthetic. Every source record is acquisition_status=synthetic_fixture or not_acquired; every identifier is a FIXTURE/CHEMBL9xxxxxx placeholder. No public dataset is redistributed here.

recipe: PYTHONPATH=analysis:tests python -c "import fixture_data as fx; from druglink import run_stage3; lever=fx.write_lever_set(OUT+'/levers.json', fx.fixture_lever_set()); cache=fx.write_fixture_cache(OUT+'/cache'); run_stage3.run(namespace='fixture', lever_set_path=lever, cache_root=cache, output_root=OUT+'/bundles', created_at='2026-07-12T00:00:00Z')"
the research_only bundle uses fx.research_lever_set() and fx.write_not_acquired_cache(..., 'research_only')
generated_by.drift_check: tests/test_stage3_handoff_and_integrity.py::test_committed_stage3_bundles_match_a_live_stage3 regenerates these from SPOT_STAGE3_ROOT (or a repo-relative 03_druglink) and asserts byte identity. It skips ONLY when no Stage-3 is reachable; the handoff and attack tests themselves never skip.

fx_c5b44dd8bee36b7d.role: the fixture handoff: 3 admissible fixture candidates, 15 parquet tables

ra_11eaff3028912b24.role: the research annotation: inspected, never admitted; nothing acquired
